headline: Rising beef prices push McDonald’s toward bigger, better burgers
summary: McDonald's knows its customers want value, and it also knows they want burgers. Delivering both of those has become a challenge, given the rising cost of beef. That's partially because the American cattle herd is at its smallest size in 75 years, the Associated Press (AP) reported. "The national ...
